Localization.Description: An attempt was detected to copy a potentially malicious file with the following extensions: hta, ps1, py, vbe, cs, csproj, proj, com, cmd, bat, vbs, js, xsl, sct

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt to copy the potentially malicious file {object.name} from host {src.host} to host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.name} is detected
An attempt to copy the potentially malicious file {object.name} from host {src.host} to host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} is detected
